name: Salmon Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly oil a bowl.
2. Combine all ingredients except cucumber slices in the bowl.
3. Mix lightly.
4. Press rice mixture into oiled mold.
5. Cover and refrigerate several hours or overnight.
6. Invert the mold onto a serving plate to unmold the salad.
7. Garnish with cucumber slices.
